/usr/bin/ar qc libtraveling_zip_lib.a CMakeFiles/traveling_zip_lib.dir/cpp20/src/hospital.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traveling_zip_lib.dir/cpp20/src/order.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traveling_zip_lib.dir/cpp20/src/priority_based_assignment_policy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traveling_zip_lib.dir/cpp20/src/euclidean_spatial_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traveling_zip_lib.dir/cpp20/src/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traveling_zip_lib.dir/cpp20/src/zip_scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traveling_zip_lib.dir/cpp20/src/zip_system_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traveling_zip_lib.dir/cpp20/src/zip_system_state_actor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traveling_zip_lib.dir/cpp20/src/trivial_routing_policy.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libtraveling_zip_lib.a
